The New Issue of the Faculty of  Journal is Out!

Kadir Has University Faculty of Law Journal Vol. XI Issue 1 has been published!

You can access the studies in the new issue of our journal, which is being scanned in ULAKBİM TRDizin, in print, at the KHAS Information Center or electronically through the Jurix database.

You can send your works for our December 2023 issue, which we dedicate to the centennial of our Republic, until the end of Sunday, October 29, 2023. For detailed information about our magazine, you can visit

hfd.khas.edu.tr.

The studies included in our latest issue are as follows:

PUBLIC LAW

Evaluation of Legal Problems Regarding the Crime of Failure to Destroy Personal Data (TCK Art. 138) in Comparison with KVKK Art. 17/2

Dr. Lecturer Member Elif Beyza AKKANAT ÖZTÜRK – Res. Asst. Can Eralp ELİBOL

Crime? Natural Event? Building Collapses During Natural Events

(An Evaluation Within the Scope of TCK Art. 170/1 and TCK Art. 171)

Comparison of Continental European and Anglo-American Legal Approaches to the Right to Be Forgotten in the Context of

Fourth Generation Rights in Terms of Judicial Decisions

A Study of Austrian Fascism

Consecutive and Parallel Individual Applications to the Human Rights Committee

A Comparison of the British and American Constitutional Orders: From Parliamentary Sovereignty to Supreme Court Dominance

Dr. Lecturer Member Aslan DELİCE

Application of Value Added Tax on Sales Made in Enforcement Offices

Sanctions as a Substitute for the Use of Force: Examining the Legal Framework Under International Law

Dr. Lecturer Member Hatice Kübra ECEMİŞ YILMAZ

Assoc. Prof. Dr. jur. Dr. Altan HEPER

Robert Nozick’s Theory of Justice: John Rawls’s Justice as Fairness Versus Empowerment Theory

The Matter of Attempt in Aggravated Crimes Due to Consequences

National Courts’ Attitudes to Rights-Based Climate Cases against Governments

Analyzing the Universality Principle: Qualifying Crimes and the Role of International Judicial Cooperation

PRIVATE LAW

The Role of the Bill of Lading in the Delivery of Cargo and Delivery of Cargo Without a Bill of Lading Within the Framework of the Provisions of the Turkish Commercial Code

The Period of the Turkish Sports Law in the Development Process of the Turkish Sports Law Alliance (TİCİ)

Consensual Consolidation and Separation of Real Estate (Splitting and Unification) Transactions

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ekrem KURT

Legal Liability of Public and Private Hospitals Arising from Medical Application and Organization Errors in Intensive Care Units

Enforcement Barriers Included in Article 55/2 of Law No. 5718 on Private International Law and Procedural Law

Strict Liability of the Motor Vehicle Operator According to Article 85/f. I of the Highway Traffic Law
